hook: Chemistry often reveals itself through ease, curiosity, and energy more than through fireworks alone.
body: You can feel attraction in the room, but deeper chemistry usually includes mutual openness and a sense that the exchange can breathe.

hook: A lot of men mistake nerves or novelty for chemistry because both can feel intense.
body: Look for emotional aliveness plus comfort, not just adrenaline.

hook: Look for emotional aliveness plus comfort, not just adrenaline.
body: Shared laughter, easy follow-up, and feeling energized after the interaction usually tell you more than one dramatic moment.

body: After a date, ask whether the energy felt alive and mutual rather than merely intense.
